description_long: This object is a modern, sleek smartphone with a large, edge-to-edge display on the front, featuring a vibrant abstract wallpaper. The back is a glossy black surface with a dual camera setup and a flash arranged vertically in the upper left corner. The sides are slim and appear to be made of metal or high-quality plastic, with minimal visible buttons or ports. The device has a foldable design, indicated by a subtle horizontal seam across the back, suggesting it can be bent in half. The overall build is compact and premium, with a smooth, reflective finish. The phone is designed for handheld use and fits comfortably in a pocket or hand.
description: A sleek, foldable black smartphone with a large edge-to-edge display and dual rear cameras, featuring a glossy, premium finish.
description_view_0: Rear view showing a glossy black back with a vertical dual camera array and a subtle horizontal seam indicating a foldable design.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the phone's slimness and the slight protrusion of the camera module.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the large, vibrant screen with an abstract wallpaper and minimal bezels.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again highlighting the device's thinness and the foldable seam.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays an abstract, colorful wallpaper with swirling pink, peach, and white shapes on a black background. No icons, widgets, or notifications are visible.
attribute_camera_placement: Two camera lenses and a flash are vertically aligned in the upper left corner on the back of the device.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are minimally visible, likely located on the right edge, possibly including a volume rocker and power button.
